settings.title: Settings
settings.hint:
Each user provides their own free TMDB API key.
Get one at themoviedb.org → Settings → API.

removeAlert.title: Remove API Key
removeAlert.message: You will need to enter a new key to use the app.

settings.aboutTmdbDisclaimer: This app uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB.
settings.aboutYoutubeDisclaimer: watcho is not affiliated with or endorsed by Google LLC.

onboarding.headline: One quick setup step
onboarding.body: watcho uses The Movie Database (TMDB) for all movie and TV show data. TMDB offers a free personal API key — you'll need one to use this app.
onboarding.step1: Create a free account at themoviedb.org
onboarding.step2: Go to Settings → API and request an API key (choose "Personal use")
onboarding.step3: Copy the key labelled API Key (v3 auth) and paste it here
onboarding.enterKeyBody: Paste the API Key (v3 auth) from your TMDB account settings.
onboarding.errorInvalid: Key not recognised by TMDB. Double-check and try again.
